content_fingerprint: openai publishes our principles essay outlining five guiding tenets for agi development openai on april 26 published a new our principles piece authored by sam altman laying out five principles the company says will govern its work as it pursues artificial general intelligence openai published an essay titled our principles on sunday april 26 2026 authored by ceo sam altman the piece marks a visible update to the company s public communications around how it approaches agi development and was promoted via the openai newsroom rss feed as the most prominent new entry that day according to the br
